text.title: Performance Testing Basics Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Dashboard shows avg latency 80ms; users complain of 2-second checkouts.
antipattern.fix: Track p50/p95/p99 separately; alarm on p99.

antipattern.symptom: Team spent 2 weeks micro-optimising a function that contributes 2% to the trace.
antipattern.fix: Always profile first; optimise only the top 3 hotspots.

antipattern.symptom: p95 doubled over 3 months; nobody noticed.
antipattern.fix: Add k6 thresholds or Locust assertions on p95 + p99 + error rate.
